business_processes.name: Finding a Market Opportunity on Upwork
business_processes.description: The process of finding a market opportunity by searching for jobs on Upwork that can be replaced or improved with an app built using AI services.

steps.description: Search for technology-related jobs on Upwork that have potential to be replaced or improved with an app.
Identify a job that can be replaced or improved with an app and make a prototype of the app.
Send a proposal to the client with the prototype and negotiate the price.

business_processes.name: Building an AI App for a Client

Build the app using AI services and negotiate the price with the client.

summary: The video discusses a business strategy that leverages Upwork for finding market opportunities, building AI-powered Minimum Viable Products (MVPs), and selling these products to clients. The process begins by scouring Upwork for business problems that can be addressed with an app or service. Once a suitable opportunity is found, an MVP is built using the no-code development platform Replet. After validation, the MVP is marketed and sold to the identified buyer. Other technologies used in this process include Air Table for database management, Zapier for integration, Calendarly for calendar management, SMS for communication, and potentially other marketing keywords such as Vibe Coding and software development pricing strategies.
